query: Add concepts/lattice-based-cryptography and concepts/nist-pqc-standardization as references for the post-quantum-crypto project.
expected_behavior: Uses python3 tools/wiki.py project link <slug> concepts/<page> for each page rather than hand-editing the project.md frontmatter
Explicitly states that wiki_refs should never be hand-edited because project link preserves YAML formatting and bumps updated automatically
Confirms both pages actually exist in the wiki before linking, rather than linking to pages that don't exist yet
